data.title: Marsh & McLennan raised to Outperform as RBC gets bullish heading into 2025
data.description:
RBC Capital Markets upgraded Marsh & McLennan (NYSE:MMC) stock to Outperform from Sector Perform on Wednesday on the view that there is "good visibility into solid top and bottom-line growth as we head into 2025."

In addition to a pick-up in revenue growth in its Risk & Insurance Services unit and improved margins, the insurance company is less sensitive to P&C pricing and positioned for any softening, analyst Scott Heleniak wrote in a note.

On valuation, Heleniak noted that (NYSE:MMC) is changing hands at 22x his 2025 EPS forecast vs. 24x for peers.

"We think that MMC should trade closer to peers based on consistently delivering strong top and bottom-line growth, successful M&A, and an active return program," the note said.

RBC's Outperform rate diverges from the SA Quant system rating and the average Wall Street analyst rating, both at Hold.

data.title: MFA Financial declares $0.35 dividend
data.description:
• MFA Financial (NYSE:MFA) declares $0.35/share quarterly dividend, in line with previous.
  • Forward yield 12.83%
  • Payable Jan. 31; for shareholders of record Dec. 31; ex-div Dec. 31.
  • See MFA Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth.

data.title: Community Health Systems to sell North Carolina hospital to Duke Health
data.description:
• Community Health Systems (NYSE:CYH) on Wednesday said a subsidiary of the company has signed an agreement to sell 123-bed Lake Norman Regional Medical Center in North Carolina and related businesses, to Duke Health for about $280 million.
  • The transaction is expected to close in the first quarter of 2025.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Diebold Nixdorf prices $950M notes offering at 100% of principal amount
data.description:
• Diebold Nixdorf (NYSE:DBD) priced its $950M senior secured notes offering at 100.000% of their principal amount.
  • The 7.750% senior secured notes are due 2030.
  • The offering is expected to close on December 18.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Robinhood says trading volume rose 16% in November
data.description:
Equity notional trading volumes were $147.1B in November, up 16% M/M and 178% Y/Y, while crypto notional trading volumes of $35.2B surged sixfold from October and eightfold from November 2023, the stock and crypto trading app company said on Wednesday.

Options contracts traded were 155.5M, down 2% M/M and up 63% Y/Y.

Funded customers at the end of November were 24.8M, up 420K from October 2024 and 1.5M from a year ago.

Assets under custody at the end of the month rose 22% M/M to $195B, representing a 106% increase Y/Y. Net deposits of $5.6B translated to a 42% annualized growth rate relative to October 2024 AUC. Over the last 12 months, net deposits were $47.4B, representing an annual growth rate of 50%.

Margin balances at the end of the month were $6.8B, up 10% M/M and 100% Y/Y.

Total cash sweep balances were $26.5B at the end of November, up 4% M/M and 74% Y/Y.

Total securities lending revenue increased 21% M/M to $23M, rising 109% on a Y/Y basis.

Robinhood (NASDAQ:HOOD) stock rose 0.3% in after-hours trading.

data.title: Coca-Cola appoints Henrique Braun as COO
data.description:
• The Coca-Cola Company (NYSE:KO) on Wednesday announced that Henrique Braun has been appointed as executive vice president and chief operating officer (COO), effective Jan. 1, 2025.
  • Braun will be responsible for all the company’s operating units worldwide, the company said.
  • Braun currently serves as EVP and President, International Development, overseeing the company’s operating units for Latin America; Japan & South Korea; ASEAN & South Pacific; Greater China and Mongolia; Africa; India & Southwest Asia; and Eurasia and Middle East.
  • KO -0.04% after hours to $62.61.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: ICF secures contracts worth over $40M
data.description:
• ICF (NASDAQ:ICFI) said on Wednesday that it has been awarded over $40 million in new and recompete contracts during the third quarter of 2024.
  • The agreements span multiple National Institutes of Health (NIH) institutes and centres.
  • Under these contracts, ICF will integrate its health, technical and scientific expertise with cloud and automated technologies, including generative AI and advanced analytics.
  • ICF (ICFI) shares were up 1.93% in post-market trading.

data.title: Tesla blows past its old closing high of three years ago
data.description:
Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) closed at $424.77 to blow past the prior all-time high closing price of $409.97 on November 4, 2021. Notably, the rally in 2021 was followed by a drop of more than 70% for the electric vehicle stock over the next 18 months.

The strong bullish vibe on Tesla (TSLA) is tied closely to the view that the Elon Musk-led company will benefit from a Trump Administration that will be friendly to the process of securing autonomous vehicle approvals as it looks to grow the robotaxi fleet rapidly over the next two years.

Wall Street is cautious on Tesla (TSLA), with the average price target at only $259.66. Meanwhile, Seeking Alpha analysts have been leaning more bearish over the last two weeks, with 6 out of 8 new ratings on the EV stock being either Sell or Strong Sell.

The next big reveal from Tesla (TSLA) will be its Q4 deliveries report, due out during the first few days of January. The report could throw a spotlight back on the sluggish growth this year for the EV part of the business.

Tesla (TSLA) is currently the 8th largest company traded in the U.S. by market cap, but has been rapidly closing the gap on Meta Platforms (META) in 7th place on the list.

data.title: BriaCell Therapeutics announces proposed public offering, shares fall
data.description:
• BriaCell Therapeutics (NASDAQ:BCTX) said on Wednesday it intends to offer to sell common shares and warrants in an underwritten public offering.
  • All the common shares and warrants are to be sold by the company.
  • The company intends to use the net proceeds from the offering primarily for working capital requirements, general corporate purposes, and the advancement of business objectives.
  • BriaCell Therapeutics (BCTX) shares fell more than 22% in post-market trading.

data.title: Chewy announces public offering of Class A common stock by selling stockholder
data.description:
• Chewy (NYSE:CHWY) on Wednesday announced the commencement of an underwritten public offering of $500 million of shares of its Class A common stock by selling stockholder.
  • The selling stockholder intends to grant the underwriters a 30-day option to purchase up to an additional $75 million of shares of Class A Common Stock.
  • Chewy will not sell any shares of its Class A Common Stock in the offering and will not receive any proceeds.
  • In addition, Chewy has agreed to purchase from the selling stockholder $50 million of Class A Common Stock at a price per share equal to the per share purchase price to be paid by the underwriters in the offering.
  • The concurrent repurchase is being executed separately from the company’s existing $500 million share repurchase program authorized on May 24, 2024, which will be unaffected by this transaction.
  • The concurrent repurchase is expected to be consummated concurrently with the offering.
  • Source: Press Release
